text: I thought I'd stop in — not quite myself lately, probably nothing.
label: common_cold/discharge

text: I came down quite suddenly with a high fever, muscle aches all over, and a persistent dry cough. 3 day(s) and barely functioning, and I'm deteriorating, I can feel it.
label: influenza/mild

text: I can barely move — high fever, shaking chills, splitting headache, bad cough. 3 day(s) like this, and I'm deteriorating, I can feel it.
label: influenza/moderate

text: I've had a low-grade fever and achy muscles for 8 day(s) — nothing terrible yet, though I think I'm slowly getting better.
label: influenza/mild

text: I've had a low-grade fever and achy muscles for 8 day(s) — nothing terrible yet, though I think I'm slowly getting better.
label: influenza/mild

text: I started with a cold but the cough has lingered — a bit of chest tightness too. 4 day(s), and it seems to be escalating. I can't catch my breath.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Productive cough and slightly short of breath climbing stairs. 5 day(s) like this, and I feel more unwell than yesterday. I'm burning up.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Coughing a lot, bringing up darker mucus, feverish, noticeably short of breath. 8 day(s), and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried.
label: influenza/mild

text: I've had a low-grade fever and achy muscles for 3 day(s) — nothing terrible yet.
label: influenza/mild

text: Woke up feeling rough: chills, headache, that fluey feeling. About 3 day(s) in, and I'm getting worse, not better.
label: influenza/mild

text: I think I'm coming down with something — bit of a fever, muscle aches, dry cough, 5 day(s) now, and I feel more unwell than yesterday. Breathing is very laboured.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I started with a cold but the cough has lingered — a bit of chest tightness too. 5 day(s).
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Slight fever, some body aches, scratchy throat. Probably flu starting, 3 day(s), though I notice it's not improving. My heart won't slow down.
label: influenza/mild

text: I came down quite suddenly with a high fever, muscle aches all over, and a persistent dry cough. 7 day(s) and barely functioning, though I think I'm slowly getting better.
label: influenza/moderate

text: Woke up feeling rough: chills, headache, that fluey feeling. About 8 day(s) in, though I think I'm slowly getting better. I'm burning up.
label: influenza/mild

text: I can't breathe properly. Severe chest pain, coughing up greenish phlegm, high temperature. 9 day(s) and scared, and it's escalating — I'm genuinely scared.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: Fever on and off, drenched in sweat, can't get out of bed. This has gone on 2 day(s), and I can't seem to shake it, which frightens me.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Felt a bit run-down this week, might be stress.
label: non-infectious
